fields.label: Message
fields.description: A more detailed description for the alert

fields.label: External ID
fields.description: If the event originates from a record in a 3rd party system, use this parameter to pass the unique ID of that record. That ID will be communicated in outbound webhook notifications from SIGNL4, which is great for correlation/synchronization of that record with the alert. If you resolve / close an alert you must use the same External ID as in the original alert.
